summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly describes this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All listed PRs remain open and non-security-sensitive in the hydrated artifact; no close, merge, or fix action is recommended under the job permissions.

actions.reason: Open contributor PR with useful focused changes but failed proof/check signals; keep it independent for maintainer/proof follow-up rather than closing or merging.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a distinct plugin fix; classify as independent and leave maintainer review/finalization outside this close-only inventory job.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a distinct provider-runtime fix and waiting-on-author status; keep it independent for author/maintainer continuation.
Maintainer-owned draft PR with a distinct capability-provider fix and waiting-on-author status; keep it independent rather than treating it as duplicate/superseded.
Useful contributor PR with sufficient proof and passing checks, but this job cannot merge or close linked work; keep it independent as the candidate fix path for maintainer review.
